Title: Namekku-sei iki hasshin! Gohan-tachi o matsu kyôfu
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Hiromi Tsuru
Plot: Bulma and her dad work on Kami-Sama's spaceship; Son Gohan sneaks out of his room to train and Chichi looks for him; Son Goku, Son Gohan, and Kuririn continue to recover in the hospital; Bulma recruits Son Gohan and Kuririn to go ...
